name: Fall Breakfast Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3 cups AM Whole Wheat Pastry Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, salt (if using), pumpkin pie spice.
2. In another bowl or container, whisk together the liquid ingredients: buttermilk, canned pumpkin, oil, and honey until well combined.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir just until the mixture is moistened and there are no dry spots of flour. The batter will be lumpy.
4. Grease a 24-cup muffin tin with butter or cooking spray.
5. Fill each muffin cup about 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan or on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
8. Loosen the muffins with a knife, then carefully invert them onto the wire rack to cool completely before serving.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "Whole Grain Muffins" tri-fold
